artifacts.summary: Official Dartmouth sources include a central undergraduate coursework policy, a staff-facing data protection/procurement overview, and a Thayer-specific engineering policy. Teaching resources, news, and course syllabi were documented but not used as claim evidence.

artifacts.claimText: For Dartmouth AB undergraduates and special non-degree students, GenAI tools are disallowed by default for submitted coursework unless expressly permitted by the course instructor.

artifacts.title: Dartmouth College GenAI Policy Evidence Draft
artifacts.summary: Official Dartmouth sources support cautious staged claims about undergraduate coursework default disallowance unless permitted, course-specific instructor authority, acknowledgement of permitted GenAI use, staff data-protection and procurement review requirements, and two Thayer-specific student/research rules. DCAL guidance, teaching-resource pages, news, and course syllabi were documented but not used as binding policy evidence.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Thayer Engineering claims are school-specific and should not be generalized to all Dartmouth students.
Staff overview claims are administrative/data-handling guidance and should not be generalized to every student classroom use case.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
